_purpose: Design-intent cumulative survival curve. Human truth source.
_note: Per-round target WR is derived from this (ratio of adjacent survivals). Autoresearch NEVER mutates this file — it's the design curve that target_cp calibrates toward.
_structure: Anchors at boss rounds (R0/R4/R8/R12/R15). Geometric interpolation within segments.

_rationale.R4: 첫 보스 — 셋업 완료, 완만한 진입
_rationale.R8: ★2 전환기 보스 — 빌드 구축 완료 여부 시험
_rationale.R12: 최종전 진입 보스 — 중후반 압박 누적
_rationale.R15: 최종 보스 — 장르 컨벤션 (Monster Train C25 ~10%, StS A20 ~5%) 사이

_tolerance_note: per-round WR calibration tolerance: ±3 percentage points
